final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input [15:0] current_value,
    input [15:0] learning_rate,
    input [15:0] gradient,
    output reg [15:0] updated_value
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    updated_value <= current_value - (learning_rate * gradient);
end

endmodule
